What we serve

Our Menu

⭐ Popular
Classic Burger
Juicy chicken patty, fresh lettuce, house sauce in a toasted sesame bun.
⭐ Popular
Loaded Crunchy Burger
Double stacked, crispy fried chicken, coleslaw and our signature chilli glaze.
⭐ Popular
Crunchy Fried Chicken
Our signature crispy coating with a perfectly seasoned crunch. Served with dipping sauce.
⭐ Popular
Pizza
Stone-baked thin crust pizza with fresh toppings, melted cheese and tomato base.
⭐ Popular
Steamed Momo
Handcrafted dumplings filled with spiced meat or veg, served with tomato achar.
Jhol Momo
Momo dunked in a warm, spiced sesame-tomato broth. A Lahan favourite.
Pan-Fried Momo
Golden-crispy on the bottom, steamed on top. Served with red chilli sauce.
Fried Noodles
Wok-tossed noodles with mixed veg, herbs and a light savory sauce.
Chilli Meatballs
Saucy, fiery meatballs tossed with spring onions and bell peppers.
Chicken Wings
Crispy wings with a seasoned crust, served with our house dipping sauce.
Cream of Mushroom Soup
Rich, velvety mushroom soup served with a slice of toast. Comfort in a bowl.
⭐ Popular
Ice Cream
Three scoops — chocolate, cookies & cream, and mango. A sweet finish.
⭐ Popular
Espresso
Strong, smooth espresso shot. The perfect pick-me-up.
Tea
Hot brewed black tea, served with a slice of lemon.
Paneer Tikka Fingers
Crispy paneer sticks coated in spiced batter, served with cheese dip.
Coleslaw Salad
Crisp cabbage, carrots, spring onion and herbs in a light dressing.

Who we are

Your Go-To Spot
in Lahan

The Burger House & Crunchy Fried Chicken is Lahan's favourite casual dining spot — the place you come to celebrate, catch up with friends, or simply satisfy that craving for something seriously good.

From hand-pressed burgers and crispy fried chicken to handmade momos, noodles, pizza and refreshing drinks, our menu is built to please every table. Whether you're driving through or sitting down, you'll feel right at home.

What people say

131 Google Reviews

"Great spot for burgers and momos in Lahan. The fried chicken is super crunchy and the jhol momo is addictive. Will definitely come back."

⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ · Google Review

"The loaded burger is massive and filling. Ice cream selection is great too — loved the mango scoop. Good for birthday celebrations."

⭐⭐⭐⭐ · Google Review

"Cozy place with snack varieties. The pan-fried momos and the pizza are my favourites. Service can be slow but food is worth it."

⭐⭐⭐⭐ · Google Review

"Drive-through is convenient. Noodles and chicken wings make for a great combo meal. Decor inside is nice for a casual dinner out."
